texts.label: text
texts.orig: Extra lunch will be charged at USD 75 per person.
texts.text: Extra lunch will be charged at USD 75 per person.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Not Permitted/Child Policy:
texts.text: Not Permitted/Child Policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children below 8 years of age will not be allowed at the camp unless their booking is on 'exclusive use' basis and in which case the children should always be under their parents/guidance supervision. Children below 3-12 years (when permitted to stay) will be charged 50% of adult sharing rate
texts.text: Children below 8 years of age will not be allowed at the camp unless their booking is on 'exclusive use' basis and in which case the children should always be under their parents/guidance supervision. Children below 3-12 years (when permitted to stay) will be charged 50% of adult sharing rate

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation Policy:
texts.text: Cancellation Policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Non-refundable 30% deposit required to confirm the booking 14 days after confirmation
texts.text: Non-refundable 30% deposit required to confirm the booking 14 days after confirmation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ 100 % Payment of the total Invoice is required 60 days to the date of arrival for high and peak season
texts.text: 100 % Payment of the total Invoice is required 60 days to the date of arrival for high and peak season

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ 100 % Payment of the total Invoice is required 30 days to the date of arrival for low season
texts.text: 100 % Payment of the total Invoice is required 30 days to the date of arrival for low season

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Any cancellation 60 days to your date of arrival leads to 65% refund of the total invoice.
texts.text: Any cancellation 60 days to your date of arrival leads to 65% refund of the total invoice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Any cancellation 45 Days to your date of arrival leads to 45 % refund of the total invoice.
texts.text: Any cancellation 45 Days to your date of arrival leads to 45 % refund of the total invoice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Any cancellation 30 days to your date of arrival leads to 25% refund of the total invoice.
texts.text: Any cancellation 30 days to your date of arrival leads to 25% refund of the total invoice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ No refund for any cancellation below 30 days
texts.text: No refund for any cancellation below 30 days

texts.label: text
texts.orig: (Consult the camp for credit on no refund bookings)
texts.text: (Consult the camp for credit on no refund bookings)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: General Contract Terms:
texts.text: General Contract Terms:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ This agreement is valid for the year 2025 and it must be renewed annually for the following years
texts.text: This agreement is valid for the year 2025 and it must be renewed annually for the following years

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ These rates are confidential and cannot be made available to a 3 rd party through internet sites, emails or any form of publishing.
texts.text: These rates are confidential and cannot be made available to a 3 rd party through internet sites, emails or any form of publishing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ A tour leader of a group pays 75% of the contracted rates in mid and high season.
texts.text: A tour leader of a group pays 75% of the contracted rates in mid and high season.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Travel Agents on FAM trip pays 30% of the contracted rates unless invited or agreed with the ownership of Lalashe Maasai Mara
texts.text: Travel Agents on FAM trip pays 30% of the contracted rates unless invited or agreed with the ownership of Lalashe Maasai Mara

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Check in on arrival date is from 12 pm and check out is at 10:00 am
texts.text: Check in on arrival date is from 12 pm and check out is at 10:00 am

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Should government alter rates the camp will negotiate the rates with the contracted agents.
texts.text: Should government alter rates the camp will negotiate the rates with the contracted agents.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ The hotel reserves the right of admission, the rooms are subject to availability
texts.text: The hotel reserves the right of admission, the rooms are subject to availability

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ✓ Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner and walking safari are weather permitting.
texts.text: Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner and walking safari are weather permitting.
